name: Ferris Wheel of the Damned
text: At the beginning of your upkeep, the wheel turns: roll a six-sided die. Ferris Wheel of the Damned deals damage equal to the result to the player to your left, then they get a Treasure token for riding. The ride does not stop. The ride has never stopped.
flavorText: Built in 1903. Inspected never. Riders report a faint screaming that may or may not be the bearings.
